title: Lenovo Exhibition Stall Design at FITAG Tech Expo Gandhinagar 2025
materials_used: Fabric|Aluminium Extrusion|Acrylic|MDF Laminate|LED Screens|Backlit Branding|LED Lighting|Premium Furniture
special_features: Product Display Wells|Brand Wall Mark|Product Counters|Reception Counter|Seating Zone
01 The Challenge: Lenovo needed a 48 sqm 2-side open stand at FITAG 2025 that could showcase multiple product lines and draw enterprise buyers.
02 What We Designed: We built a modern technology showcase with backlit product display zones, a branded reception counter and seating area for client consultations.
03 Why It Worked: The clean modern layout gave Lenovo strong brand visibility at one of India's top IT trade shows.
